'''rashuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oestratetraenol|oestratetraenol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oestratetraenol|oestratetraenol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rashuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshirith|ræshirith]] || [[word:ræshirij|ræshirij]] || [[word:ræshirish|ræshirish]] || [[word:ræshiri|ræshiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashushuruth|rashushuruth]] || [[word:rashushuruj|rashushuruj]] || [[word:rashushurush|rashushurush]] || [[word:rashushuru|rashushuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashuruth|rashuruth]] || [[word:rashuruj|rashuruj]] || [[word:rashurush|rashurush]] || [[word:rashuru|rashuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashufrufth|rashufrufth]] || [[word:rashufrufj|rashufrufj]] || [[word:rashufrufsh|rashufrufsh]] || [[word:rashufruf|rashufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashuruthu|rashuruthu]] || [[word:rashuruju|rashuruju]] || [[word:rashurushu|rashurushu]] || [[word:rashuruku|rashuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashuruth|rashuruth]] || [[word:rashuruj|rashuruj]] || [[word:rashurush|rashurush]] || [[word:rashuru|rashuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashuruthul|rashuruthul]] || [[word:rashurujul|rashurujul]] || [[word:rashurushul|rashurushul]] || [[word:rashurukul|rashurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashuruuthuthu|rashuruuthuthu]] || [[word:rashuruujuju|rashuruujuju]] || [[word:rashuruushushu|rashuruushushu]] || [[word:rashuruuku|rashuruuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashuruthun|rashuruthun]] || [[word:rashurujun|rashurujun]] || [[word:rashurushun|rashurushun]] || [[word:rashurukun|rashurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashuruthuoro|rashuruthuoro]] || [[word:rashurujuoro|rashurujuoro]] || [[word:rashurushuoro|rashurushuoro]] || [[word:rashurukuoro|rashurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
